nasb.text: Then He said, “Throw it on the ground.” So he threw it on the ground, and it became a serpent; and Moses fled from it.

esv.text: And he said, “Throw it on the ground.” So he threw it on the ground, and it became a serpent, and Moses ran from it.

cnv.text: 耶和華說：“把它丟在地上。”摩西把它一丟在地上，它就變了蛇；摩西就逃跑，離開了牠。

ccb.text: 耶和华说：“把它丢在地上！”于是，摩西把杖丢在地上，杖变成了一条蛇。摩西连忙跑开。
